'''鈭歝h-r-p''' ('''kacharap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unanchor|unanchor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unanchor|unanchor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kacharap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thicharap|thicharap]] || [[word:jicharap|jicharap]] || [[word:shicharap|shicharap]] || [[word:kicharap|kicharap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthucharap|thuthucharap]] || [[word:jujucharap|jujucharap]] || [[word:shushucharap|shushucharap]] || [[word:kukucharap|kukucharap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thucharap|thucharap]] || [[word:jucharap|jucharap]] || [[word:shucharap|shucharap]] || [[word:kucharap|kucharap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thucharap|thucharap]] || [[word:jucharap|jucharap]] || [[word:shucharap|shucharap]] || [[word:kucharap|kucharap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thecharap|thecharap]] || [[word:jecharap|jecharap]] || [[word:shecharap|shecharap]] || [[word:kecharap|kecharap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothocharap|thothocharap]] || [[word:jojocharap|jojocharap]] || [[word:shoshocharap|shoshocharap]] || [[word:kokocharap|kokocharap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thocharap|thocharap]] || [[word:jocharap|jocharap]] || [[word:shocharap|shocharap]] || [[word:kocharap|kocharap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thocharap|thocharap]] || [[word:jocharap|jocharap]] || [[word:shocharap|shocharap]] || [[word:kocharap|kocharap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]] || [[word:charap|charap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙charap|th忙charap]] || [[word:j忙charap|j忙charap]] || [[word:sh忙charap|sh忙charap]] || [[word:k忙charap|k忙charap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathacharap|thathacharap]] || [[word:jajacharap|jajacharap]] || [[word:shashacharap|shashacharap]] || [[word:kakacharap|kakacharap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thacharap|thacharap]] || [[word:jacharap|jacharap]] || [[word:shacharap|shacharap]] || [[word:kacharap|kacharap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thacharap|thacharap]] || [[word:jacharap|jacharap]] || [[word:shacharap|shacharap]] || [[word:kacharap|kacharap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shacharap|shacharap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshacharap|goshacharap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishacharap|gokishacharap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shacharapn眉|shacharapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshacharapnkn眉|goshacharapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishacharapn眉|gokishacharapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shacharapsh毛|shacharapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshacharapnksh毛|goshacharapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishacharapsh毛|gokishacharapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shacharapro|shacharapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshacharapnkro|goshacharapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishacharapro|gokishacharapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shacharapmu|shacharapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshacharapnkmu|goshacharapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishacharapmu|gokishacharapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shacharapsher|shacharapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshacharapnksher|goshacharapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishacharapsher|gokishacharapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shacharapng|shacharapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshacharapnkng|goshacharapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishacharapng|gokishacharapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shacharapya|shacharapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshacharapnkya|goshacharapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishacharapya|gokishacharapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shacharapyam|shacharapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshacharapnkyam|goshacharapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishacharapyam|gokishacharapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shacharapn眉sh毛|shacharapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshacharapnkn眉sh毛|goshacharapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishacharapn眉sh毛|gokishacharapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shacharapn眉ro|shacharapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshacharapnkn眉ro|goshacharapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishacharapn眉ro|gokishacharapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shacharapn眉mu|shacharapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshacharapnkn眉mu|goshacharapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishacharapn眉mu|gokishacharapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shacharapsh毛n眉|shacharapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshacharapnksh毛n眉|goshacharapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishacharapsh毛n眉|gokishacharapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shacharapsh毛ro|shacharapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshacharapnksh毛ro|goshacharapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishacharapsh毛ro|gokishacharapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shacharapsh毛mu|shacharapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshacharapnksh毛mu|goshacharapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishacharapsh毛mu|gokishacharapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shacharapron眉|shacharapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshacharapnkron眉|goshacharapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishacharapron眉|gokishacharapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shacharaprosh毛|shacharaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshacharapnkrosh毛|goshacharapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishacharaprosh毛|gokishacharaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shacharapromu|shacharapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshacharapnkromu|goshacharapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishacharapromu|gokishacharapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shacharapmun眉|shacharapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshacharapnkmun眉|goshacharapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishacharapmun眉|gokishacharapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shacharapmush毛|shacharapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshacharapnkmush毛|goshacharapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishacharapmush毛|gokishacharapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shacharapmuro|shacharapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshacharapnkmuro|goshacharapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishacharapmuro|gokishacharapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
